text_0: Real case from Churn Lens: A $2.1M ARR target showed 3% month-over-month MRR growth. Churn Lens computed organic MRR: the company was losing 4.2% of revenue every month to churn and contraction. Without $73K/month in new sales, the business would lose half its revenue in 14 months. The buyer re-priced the deal with a 2.1× multiple instead of 4.5×.
